stemHtml: An air mass with a temperature of 10°C and a dew point of 05°C is converging with another air mass and advection takes place. What temperature and dew point should this new air mass have in order to create fog?

options.a: A temperature of 20°C and a dew point of 05°C.
options.b: A temperature of 20°C and a dew point of 10°C.
options.c: A temperature of 25°C and a dew point of 15°C.
options.d: A temperature of 10°C and a dew point of 05°C.
